case_title: JEAN LESURE VS. VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO MAY-10-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JEAN LESURE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JUDITH GOODMAN, HOSPITAL ADMINIDTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED.
